channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][PV][STAFF][公开] Anime News Network Kept Man Princess Knight TV Anime的 预告 Video 公开 More 制作阵容 Members, January 2027 Debut

item.title: [动画][PV] Anime News Network Let Me Fix You 动画 Streams Promotional Video
